heading: Authorization of appropriations for rehabilitation programs
label: 79n Authorization of appropriations for rehabilitation programs
text: Effective on , there are hereby authorized to be appropriated $33,000,000 to carry out the rehabilitation provisions of this Act.October 1, 1978
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, means , , , which, insofar as classified to the Code, enacted sections 79c–1 and 79k to 79q of this title, amended former section 1a–1 and sections 79b and 79c of this title, and enacted provisions set out and formerly set out as notes under . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 95–25092 Stat. 163section 79k of this titleMar. 27, 1978
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , , which comprises this subchapter.Pub. L. 90–54582 Stat. 931Oct. 2, 1968
